task.title: Task
task.description: Natural language task for the agent. Can involve Notion operations, YouTube research, or both.
task.placeholder:
e.g. List the 5 most recently edited pages in my Notion workspace
e.g. Search YouTube for clerk creators and append the top 10 channels to my Marketing Research page

llmBaseUrl.title: LLM Base URL
llmBaseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint base URL. Defaults to https://llm.scalekit.cloud.

llmModel.title: LLM Model
llmModel.description: Model name passed to the LLM endpoint.

llmApiKey.title: LLM API Key
llmApiKey.description: API key for the LLM endpoint.

authTimeoutSeconds.title: Auth Timeout (seconds)
authTimeoutSeconds.description: How long the actor waits for the user to complete Notion authorization via the magic link before failing (default: 300 = 5 minutes).

youtubeIdentifier.title: YouTube Account Identifier
youtubeIdentifier.description: Scalekit identifier for the shared YouTube connected account. Only needed for tasks that involve YouTube research. Leave as default unless you have a dedicated YouTube connection.

maxIterations.title: Max Agent Iterations
maxIterations.description: Safety limit on the number of LLM + tool call rounds.
